« We build too many walls and not enough bridges » - Isaac Newton

On August 2, 216 BCE, Hannibal led an army of about 50,000 to 55,000 Carthaginian and allied troops against a Roman force of around 86,000. Despite being outnumbered, Hannibal's tactical genius led to a devastating defeat for the Roman army. The Battle of Cannae lasted just one… https://t.co/8rMnAGwW4z https://t.co/QbOzC8D2fX

Did you know that 900,000 years ago, humanity was on the brink of extinction? 😱☠️ Researchers estimate that during the first half of the Pleistocene, our ancestors of the genus Homo saw their population decline by 98.7%.
